49: I'm fairly sure I've had Tavnazian tacos before. They were famous for their heartiness and helped stave off fatigue. Those who often found themselves on the defensive in battle would do well eat one before a fight.

101: Upon speaking with the Tonawawtan filcher, the auction will begin. You may also first speak with the other prospective buyers to receive hints regarding their potential bids.
